title: 5 Fingers
writer: Michael Wilson, L.C. Moyzisch, Joseph L. Mankiewicz
actors: James Mason, Danielle Darrieux, Michael Rennie
plot: During WWII the valet to the British Ambassador to Ankara sells British secrets to the Germans while trying to romance a refugee Polish countess.
awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 3 wins & 4 nominations total
